hero.headline: SSODL Online MBA in Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: Symbiosis International University's fully-online MBA with a Marketing specialisation. NIRF #24 University, NAAC A++, UGC-DEB approved. Rs 55,000 work-experience scholarship for 2+ year professionals. Brand Management, Marketing Analytics, and Sales Force Management in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: SSODL Online MBA Marketing: Symbiosis brand (NIRF #24, NAAC A++), Rs 55K work-experience scholarship, Brand Management and Marketing Analytics in Sem 3-4. Fees Rs 3.15L with scholarship, Rs 3.70L standard. Strongest fit for FMCG and consumer brand careers in western India.

about.body:
The SSODL Online MBA in Marketing is offered by Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning, the fully-online arm of Symbiosis International University (SIU), Pune. SSODL launched in 2020-21 as a UGC-DEB approved institution and is distinct from SCDL, which offers distance diploma programmes.

SIU carries NAAC A++ accreditation and NIRF #24 University ranking (2025). The Marketing specialisation builds on a tech-forward core curriculum (AI and ML for Business Management, Digital Marketing, Design Thinking, and R Programming in Sem 1-2) and adds brand strategy, consumer insights, and sales force management in Sem 3-4.

The programme suits working professionals in FMCG, retail, and consumer technology who want the Symbiosis name without relocating to Pune. The Rs 55,000 work-experience scholarship reduces the total to Rs 3.15L for applicants with 2+ years of experience, making it more competitive against peer online MBAs.

sem3Subjects.name: Project I (4 Credits)
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct a structured marketing research project on a live brand or category of the student's choice.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Governance and Ethics
sem3Subjects.description: Apply ESG principles and responsible marketing practices to brand communications and campaign strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Crisis Management in Business
sem3Subjects.description: Manage brand reputation crises, product recall communications, and social media incident response.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Develop competitive strategy, SWOT analysis, and long-range marketing roadmaps for business units.

sem3Subjects.name: AI and ML for Business Management
sem3Subjects.description: Apply AI-powered personalisation, predictive churn models, and recommendation engine logic to marketing.

sem3Subjects.name: Brand Management
sem3Subjects.description: Build brand equity through positioning, architecture decisions, brand extension analysis, and brand health metrics.

sem3Subjects.name: Integrated Marketing Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Plan ATL, BTL, and digital channel mix for unified campaign messaging and media budget allocation.

sem3Subjects.name: Services Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Apply the 7Ps model to service brand management in hospitality, BFSI, healthcare, and telecom sectors.

sem3Subjects.name: Retail Management
sem3Subjects.description: Manage category strategy, planogram design, visual merchandising, and trade marketing for retail channels.

sem4Subjects.name: Project II (10 Credits)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete a full marketing dissertation applying Sem 3-4 theory to a real brand or market problem.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship
sem4Subjects.description: Build a marketing-led startup pitch: value proposition, channel strategy, and go-to-market plan.

sem4Subjects.name: Global Business Environment
sem4Subjects.description: Adapt brand and marketing strategy for international market entry, cultural segmentation, and export channels.

sem4Subjects.name: Conflict and Negotiation
sem4Subjects.description: Negotiate agency fees, media buys, and co-marketing agreements with partners and vendors.

sem4Subjects.name: Doing Business in India
sem4Subjects.description: Understand regional consumer diversity, tier-2/tier-3 market penetration, and rural distribution in India.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Transformation and Organizational Turnaround
sem4Subjects.description: Lead marketing function restructuring during brand portfolio rationalisation and corporate transformation.

sem4Subjects.name: Marketing Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Apply attribution modelling, marketing mix modelling, and A/B testing frameworks to campaign performance.

sem4Subjects.name: Sales Force and Channel Management
sem4Subjects.description: Design territory structures, distributor incentive schemes, and secondary sales tracking for FMCG and B2B.

sem4Subjects.name: Customer Relationship Management
sem4Subjects.description: Implement CRM strategy, loyalty programme design, and customer lifetime value analysis for brand retention.

sem4Subjects.name: Product Management
sem4Subjects.description: Manage product roadmaps, feature prioritisation, and cross-functional launch execution for consumer products.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all SSODL MBA specialisations. See the main SSODL Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Marketing MBA graduates from SSODL Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** FMCG, Consumer technology, Retail, Digital marketing agencies, D2C brands, Media and entertainment

**Entry-level roles:** Brand Executive (management track), Category Analyst, Digital Marketing Manager, Trade Marketing Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Brand Manager, Senior Brand Manager, Head of Digital Marketing, Marketing Analytics Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Marketing, Marketing Director, CMO, Group Brand Manager

**Top hiring organisations:** HUL, P&G India, Nestle India, Mondelez, Dabur, Marico, Godrej Consumer Products, ITC FMCG, Reckitt, GroupM, Publicis India, Swiggy, Zomato, Reliance Retail

skills.body:
The SSODL Marketing specialisation builds skills that FMCG and consumer brand employers test at brand manager and marketing head levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Brand Management: brand equity measurement, brand funnel analysis, positioning statement development, and brand extension risk assessment
- Marketing Analytics: attribution modelling, marketing mix modelling, A/B testing, and campaign performance dashboards using digital tools
- Integrated Marketing Communication: ATL and BTL channel planning, media mix optimisation, and campaign brief writing for unified brand campaigns
- AI and ML for Business Management: AI-powered personalisation logic, predictive churn models, and recommendation engine concepts for martech-aware brand management

**Applied skills:**
- Sales Force and Channel Management: territory design, distributor incentive schemes, secondary sales tracking, and trade marketing for FMCG national sales roles
- Retail Management: category strategy, visual merchandising, and trade marketing for modern and general trade channels

**Soft skills:** Writing creative briefs for external agencies, presenting brand health data to senior management, defending marketing investment against finance teams in P&L reviews, and managing cross-functional campaign execution.

comparisons.body:
Comparing SSODL Online MBA Marketing against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing and Sales Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity Marketing and Sales covers brand management, IMC, and sales management with a focus on breadth. SSODL Marketing adds AI and ML for Business Management, R Programming, and Marketing Analytics as dedicated subjects, creating a stronger tech-in-marketing profile. SSODL's Rs 3.15L (with scholarship) is higher than Amity, but the Symbiosis brand carries stronger recognition in Pune and western India FMCG companies.

**vs MUJ Online MBA Marketing:** MUJ is NAAC A+ and NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000-1,80,000. MUJ Marketing is more affordable with Coursera Plus included, but the MUJ brand is newer in the FMCG hiring market. SSODL's Symbiosis brand is more established at Pune-headquartered consumer companies. Choose MUJ for cost and Coursera access; choose SSODL for Symbiosis recognition.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ at Rs 1.96L-2.20L. NMIMS Marketing is stronger for Mumbai-headquartered FMCG brand management and carries higher name recognition at HUL, P&G, and Mondelez hiring. SSODL is more competitive for Pune-region FMCG and consumer technology companies.

fees.body:
The SSODL Online MBA in Marketing offers 2 fee tracks based on applicant work experience:

**Track 1 â€” Standard (under 2 years work experience)**:
- Application fee: Rs 1,000
- Registration fee: Rs 10,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 3,70,000 across 4 semesters
- Semester breakdown: Rs 92,500 each for Sem 1-2 and Rs 87,500 each for Sem 3-4
- Year 1 total: Rs 1,95,000 (including Rs 10,000 registration)
- Year 2 total: Rs 1,75,000

**Track 2 â€” With Work Experience Scholarship (2+ years experience)**:
- Application fee: Rs 1,000
- Registration fee: Rs 10,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 3,15,000 after Rs 55,000 experience-based scholarship
- Semester breakdown: Rs 80,000 each for Sem 1-2 and Rs 72,500 each for Sem 3-4
- Year 1 total: Rs 1,70,000
- Year 2 total: Rs 1,45,000

The Rs 55,000 experience scholarship applies whether you pay semester-wise or opt for one-time upfront payment. Submit 2+ years work experience proof during admission to claim.

EMI is available through the university's marketing partner. This is interest-bearing EMI, not zero-cost. Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options and approval terms.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with SSODL each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and scholarship eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Symbiosis International University (SIU) and carries the SIU name with the MBA designation. The Marketing specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India. SSODL is separate from SCDL; both are Symbiosis entities, but SSODL is the UGC-DEB approved online MBA arm.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from SSODL Online MBA Marketing alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Priya Nair
items.liked: The Symbiosis name opened doors at FMCG companies in Pune that I couldn't reach before. Brand Management and Marketing Analytics subjects were genuinely useful in interviews.
items.disliked: LMS had occasional buffering issues during live sessions. Nothing that affected learning significantly.
items.body: I had 4 years in trade marketing and wanted a credential for brand manager roles. SSODL's Rs 55K scholarship brought the fee within reach. Got placed at a mid-size FMCG in 6 months of graduation. The Symbiosis brand recognition in Pune is real.

items.name: Sameer Joshi
items.liked: AI and ML for Business Management in Sem 2 was unexpectedly strong. Helped me pitch a personalisation project to my manager.
items.disliked: Fees are higher than online MBA peers. Interest-bearing EMI adds to the total cost â€” I wish zero-cost EMI was available like some other unis.
items.body: Joined after 3 years in digital marketing. The work-exp scholarship knocked Rs 55K off, which helped. Content quality was solid. One missed expectation: the Symbiosis on-campus MBA alumni network does not fully overlap with SSODL alumni, so networking took more effort than expected.

items.name: Meera Pillai
items.liked: Strong brand name on the resume. Consumer Behaviour and Insights was well-designed with real case studies.
items.disliked: Placement support was passive â€” job board and resume review only. Proactive placement outreach was limited compared to campus MBA expectations.
items.body: The degree is legit and the Symbiosis brand does work for Bengaluru consumer brand companies. But if you are expecting active placement like a top B-school, manage expectations. Self-driven job search is essential.

faqs.question: How does SSODL's work-experience scholarship work?
faqs.answer: Applicants with 2 or more years of documented work experience receive a Rs 55,000 scholarship off the standard Rs 3,70,000 program fee. The scholarship applies whether you pay semester-wise or in a single upfront payment. Submit proof of work experience during the admission process to have it applied automatically.

faqs.question: Is SSODL Online MBA the same as Symbiosis on-campus MBA?
faqs.answer: Both are awarded by Symbiosis International University and carry UGC recognition. The on-campus MBA (SIBM, SCMHRD, etc.) is a full-time residential programme. SSODL Online MBA is a UGC-DEB approved fully-online programme. The university name on the certificate is the same, but the mode is different. Employers in most corporate sectors treat UGC-DEB approved online MBAs as equivalent for eligibility purposes.

faqs.question: Does SSODL offer no-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: No. SSODL EMI is interest-bearing and routed through the university's marketing partner. This is different from MUJ and NMIMS which offer zero-cost EMI through their respective partners. Factor in the EMI interest cost when comparing total programme cost.

faqs.question: What marketing roles do SSODL Marketing MBA graduates typically get?
faqs.answer: Most graduates move into brand management, digital marketing, and marketing analytics roles. Common hiring sectors include FMCG, consumer technology, and D2C brands. The Symbiosis brand carries stronger recognition for Pune and Mumbai-headquartered consumer companies.

faqs.question: Is the Marketing specialisation available for freshers or only working professionals?
faqs.answer: Both freshers and working professionals are eligible for the SSODL MBA. Freshers pay the standard Rs 3,70,000 track. Working professionals with 2+ years experience qualify for the Rs 55,000 scholarship and the Rs 3,15,000 track. Eligibility requires graduation with 50% marks.

chooseIf: You want the Symbiosis International University brand, particularly for FMCG, consumer technology, or retail marketing careers in Pune and western India.
You have 2+ years work experience and the Rs 55,000 scholarship reduces the effective fee to a competitive level.
You want a tech-forward marketing curriculum with AI and ML, R Programming, and Marketing Analytics built into the core.
consider: If fee is the primary concern, Amity Online MBA Marketing (Rs 2.25L) and MUJ Online MBA Marketing (Rs 1.53L-1.80L with Coursera Plus) are more affordable.
If zero-cost EMI matters, MUJ and NMIMS offer zero-cost EMI through their marketing partners; SSODL does not.
If Mumbai FMCG brand recognition is the priority, NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management carries stronger employer recognition in Mumbai's consumer brand ecosystem.
